summary: Standardize SkillRLManager persistence path to ~/.opencode/skill-rl.json across all consumers. Fixed 3 divergent path references: (1) index.js:130 was using ./skill-rl-state.json (relative, wrong), (2) models/route.ts:156 was using skill-rl-state.json (wrong suffix), (3) file-watcher.ts:45 was using skill-rl-state.json (wrong suffix). Added os.homedir() canonical path with one-time migration from legacy ./skill-rl-state.json. Added production SkillRLManager instantiation in create-managers.ts (previously only instantiated in 5 test files — never in production).
notes: Zero stale skill-rl-state references remain in source. SkillRLManager path verified: node -e '...' returns PASS. Integration test: 5 pass, 0 fail. Migration block preserves existing data from legacy path.
